creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Trying to compile/update port databases/py-sqlite3 fails either with SIGNAL 10 or in rare cases with SIGNAL 11.

This happens on ALL recently updated (most recent sources) FreeBSD 10.0-CURRENT systems.

How-To-Repeat: Compile port databases/py-sqlite3 on an up-to-date FreeBSD 10.0-CUR system
